title: Group Health Talk
institution: Manikaka Topawala Institute of Nursing, CHARUSAT – Community Health Nursing

fields.label: Name of the Students
fields.hint: List all student names involved in the group health talk

fields.label: Group to be Taught
fields.hint: e.g. Pregnant women, School children, Farmers, Elderly group

fields.label: A.V. Aids
fields.hint: e.g. Flashcards, Charts, Posters, PowerPoint, Pamphlets

fields.label: Method of Teaching
fields.hint: e.g. Lecture, Discussion, Demonstration, Question & Answer

fields.label: General Objective
fields.hint: One broad overarching objective of the health talk

fields.label: Specific Objectives
fields.hint: List up to 5 specific, measurable objectives

sections.hint: Each row corresponds to one segment of the health talk session. Add as many rows as needed.

teaching_learning_activities.label: Teaching / Learning Activities
teaching_learning_activities.hint: e.g. Lecture, Group discussion, Demonstration, Q&A

av_aids.label: AV Aids
av_aids.hint: e.g. Chart, Poster, Flashcard, PPT slide

evaluation.label: Evaluation
evaluation.hint: How will learning be assessed for this segment?

fields.label: Summary
fields.hint: Briefly summarize the key points covered during the health talk

fields.label: Conclusion
fields.hint: Describe the outcomes, participant response, and closing remarks

fields.label: Bibliography
fields.hint: Use APA or Vancouver citation style

sections.hint: Each item is scored on a scale of 1–5

develop_and_maintain_rapport.label: Interpersonal Relationship - Develop and maintain good rapport

gathering_accurate_data.label: Assessment - Gathering accurate and relevant data

clinical_assessments.label: Assessment - Conduct clinical assessments and physical evaluations

determine_knowledge_background.label: Assessment - Determine participants' knowledge and educational background

evaluate_health_issues.label: Assessment - Evaluate the health issues affecting the community

develop_health_diagnosis.label: Assessment - Develop a health diagnosis based on community data

record_and_prioritize.label: Assessment - Record and prioritize key issues

selection_and_seating.label: Planning & Management - Selection of area, appropriate seating arrangements

av_aids_quality.label: AV Aids - Adequate, appropriate size, clear and self-explanatory

language_simplicity.label: AV Aids - Language simple, local and easily understandable

introduction_and_communication.label: Implementation & Org - Intro of self/topic, audible voice, good communication & leadership

learner_engagement.label: Implementation & Org - Identifies learner level, motivates, clears doubt, holds attention

time_and_content_management.label: Implementation & Org - Repetition of key points, consistency, time management, effective discussion, attractive conclusion

participant_involvement.label: Feedback - Individual response, active involvement, sharing of expressions
